mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rikishi (shikona, heya, height, weight) VALUES (#{shikona}, #{heya}, #{height}, #{weight})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rikishi ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id FROM rikishi WHERE shikona LIKE CONCAT(#{shikona}::varchar, '%') LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT heya FROM rikishi WHERE heya IS NOT NULL AND heya != '' ORDER BY heya ASC
